title: MojoBills
description: SaaS billing platform for Ghana organizations. Developed billing APIs, recurring payment logic, email notifications, and reporting modules using ASP.NET Core, Angular, ADO.NET, and Oracle with optimized stored procedures.

title: Merchant On-boarding
description: Led team of 3 developers to build merchant on-boarding module for Inter-pay Ghana. Developed RESTful APIs using ASP.NET Core and Angular frontend, streamlining merchant activation process for Ghana's digital payment ecosystem.

title: LeadGenHelper
description: Developed AI-driven proposal automation platform integrating OpenAI GPT, RAG pipeline, and Upwork API. Implemented user authentication, RBAC, job feed parsing, and intelligent cover letter generation reducing job application time by 70% and client-sales team communication time by 50%.

title: NutriCare
description: Built full-stack nutrition platform using Django, MySQL, and LLM integration. Implemented AI chatbot for dietary guidance, online consultation booking, e-commerce module for supplements, personalized diet plans, and food nutrient checker.

title: Healthcare Billing Application
description: Production-grade healthcare billing system processing 1,000s of patient payment transactions daily with 99.9% uptime. Integrated with Mirth Connect and HL7 DFT for healthcare data workflows, featuring custom SSRS reports.

title: Fintech Platform - UK & Ghana
description: Multi-region fintech platform serving UK and Ghana markets, processing 10,000+ daily bill generations and member invitations. Reduced critical production issues by 40% through rigorous testing and code optimization.
